case_title: JANAE FARRAH KOYLASS VS. TEOLA WATSON

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $511.16 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOYLASS, JANAE FARRAH AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA
CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET - COVER SHEET / WITH P.O.S. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOYLASS, JANAE FARRAH

THE HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JAN-03-2019 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-25-2019 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS FILED A REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SUPPORTED BY A LETTER FROM A MEDICAL PROVIDER. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL FILE A MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT IF WARRANTED ON OR BEFORE FEBRUARY 25, 2019. THE LEVYING OFFICER SHALL MAINTAIN THE ACCOUNT AND WRIT OF EXECUTION PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT. THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS STAYED.

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR FEB-25-2019 IS DENIED. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. THE JUDGMENT DEBTORS CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNING HELD TO THE JUDGEMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION: DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR KOYLASS, JANAE FARRAH ASSIGNED TO UPSTREAM CAPITAL INVESTMENTS, LLC.   ASSIGNEMENT OF JUDGMENT - COLE W. YEARGIN, ESQ (SBN 275400) HEMMING & ASSOCIATES, P.C.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED MAR-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY KOYLASS, JANAE FARRAH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. JUDGMENT CREDITOR JANAE FARRAH KOYLASS IS PRESENT. JUDGMENT DEBTOR TEOLA WATSON IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HER SON MICHAEL GULDNER. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN ALLOWED MS. WATSON'S SON TO APPEAR ON HER BEHALF DUE TO MS. WATSON'S MEDICAL CONDITION. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR WAS GIVEN UNTIL JAN-10-2019 TO SUBMIT A FILED DECLARATION SUPPORTING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION WITH A MAILING PROOF OF SERVICE INCLUDED. THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR IS TO FILE HER RESPONSE BY JAN-17-2019 WITH A MAILING PROOF OF SERVICE INCLUDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,305.00 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 11/20/2018. AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOYLASS, JANAE FARRAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA $8,562.74 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,637.74 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $2,412.66 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $293.35 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WATSON, TEOLA
